message:
Running command: # Still stuck in step 32. 24+ minutes since GRT completed. No new output. 2.3% CPU.
# Something is happening silently. Let's check if DRT started inside step 32
# (LibreLane 2.4.6 might do DRT within the globalrouting step).
# Also check if there's a new ODB file being written.
find /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4 -name "*.odb" -newer /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/state_in.json 2>/dev/null | head -3
echo "---"
ls /proc/$(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid)/fd 2>/dev/null | head -5
ls -la /proc/$(cat /tmp/pnr_v4.pid)/fd/ 2>/dev/null | grep "\.odb\|\.log\|guide" | tail -5
